description: Case-local governing specification evidence bundle. This is separate from the reusable LLM wiki.

spec_manifest.json.purpose: Document provenance and review policy for a source specification.

spec_inventory.json.purpose: Whole-document page inventory with artifact paths and retrieval scores.

spec_candidates.json.purpose: Unreviewed candidate requirements, figures, tables, equations, maps, masks, and loading models.

spec_review_queue.json.purpose: Engineer classification/review queue before evidence can drive geometry or compliance.

promotion_rules: Candidate numeric values are not compliance constraints until reviewed.
Compliance thresholds require reviewer_status approved_for_design and tier_0 source provenance.
Figure-derived geometry requires reviewer_status visual_cross_checked or approved_for_design before layout generation.
Every generated coordinate, net, port, and bench parameter derived from spec evidence must reference the source candidate or reviewed evidence record.
